title: tecticornia pergranulata subsp. elongata
intro: Tecticornia pergranulata subsp. elongata, also known as a type of succulent plant, is a sub-species of the Tecticornia pergranulata plant native to Western Australia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Western Australia for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tecticornia pergranulata subsp. elongata are reported to include wound healing, pain relief, and reduced inflammation. Tinctures and infusions are common herbal preparations of this plant, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
